description_long: This object consists of three pancakes arranged in a vertical stack, each with a distinct color and a lattice pattern on top. The pancakes range from a dark brown at the bottom, a golden brown in the middle, to a pale beige at the top, suggesting different levels of doneness or flavoring. Each pancake is topped with a small, round red fruit, likely a cherry, adding a pop of color and a decorative touch. The lattice pattern appears to be made from strips of a lighter material, possibly icing or dough, crisscrossing over a red filling that peeks through the gaps. The pancakes have a slightly domed shape and a soft, textured surface, with the filling visible beneath the lattice. No plate or serving surface is present, and the pancakes are shown floating or stacked directly on top of each other.
description: A stack of three pancakes, each with a lattice top and a red cherry garnish, ranging in color from dark brown to pale beige, with visible red filling beneath the lattice.
description_view_0: Three pancakes stacked vertically, showing the lattice tops and red cherries, with the dark brown pancake at the bottom and the pale one at the top.
description_view_1: Side view of the pancakes, highlighting their thickness and the color gradient from dark to light, with lattice and cherries visible.
description_view_2: Reverse vertical view, with the pale pancake now at the bottom and the dark one at the top, all showing lattice and cherry toppings.
description_view_3: Angled top-down view, emphasizing the lattice patterns and red cherries on each pancake, with the color gradient from left (pale) to right (dark).
